title: Publish Candidate
description: A lab artifact eligible for publication on the portfolio site. Each lab appends one of these to its publish_candidates/ directory when an artifact ratifies.

id.description: URL-safe slug. Used as the page filename and the unique identifier across the manifest.

lab.description: Source lab. The curator scopes its run to one lab per invocation to avoid cross-lab content bleed.

type.description: Long-form report (~2,500-4,000 words) or short-form note (~500-1,500 words).

status.description: Lab-side ratification status. The curator only processes 'ready'.

title.description: Public title for the published page.

summary.description: One-to-two sentence summary used in writing list, RSS feed, and social cards.

oneOf.description: Lab-relative path. Resolves against the entry's own lab root.
Cross-lab source: lab-prefixed path. Resolves against that named lab's root.

source_artifacts.description: Source files the curator reads when adapting. Plain strings resolve against the entry's own lab root (~/Desktop/Fun/lab/ for hive, ~/Desktop/AGI/ for agi). Object form {lab, path} is for cross-lab sources (e.g. a HIVE-authored piece that observes AGI source material).

ratified_at.description: Cycle ID (e.g. 'C108') or named ratification anchor (e.g. 'closure_memo_2026-04-18'). The lab's own discipline determines the value.

ratified_date.description: ISO date when the artifact was ratified by the lab.

tags.description: Topic tags. Used for cross-piece linking and future tag-based browsing.

channels.description: Channels to cross-post to. Website is always included; HN/LinkedIn are opt-in per-piece. HN posts a paste-ready submission suggestion to the operator's log. LinkedIn generates a paste-ready teaser file under channel_drafts/. Neither auto-posts to the platform.

voice_fit_target.description: Minimum voice-fit score required to pass the voice judge. Default 6.5 per Task 1 calibration.

novelty_target.description: Minimum novelty score required (10 = entirely new vs. already-published).

risk_tier.description: Risk tier (1=PR required, 2=auto-merge if judges pass, 3=24h veto window). Null until classifier runs.

curator_state.description: Curator-side processing state. Lab writes 'pending'. Curator transitions through processing, then to one of the terminal states.

published_url.description: Set by curator on successful publish.

published_at.description: Set by curator on successful publish.

held_reason.description: Set by curator if status transitions to 'held'. Names the failing gate (e.g. 'voice judge: 5.2/10 below threshold 6.5').

scores.description: Set by curator after judges run. Persisted in the manifest entry as audit trail.
